parameters.query:
WITH upsert AS (
    INSERT INTO booking_locks (provider_id, start_time, lock_key, owner_token, acquired_at, expires_at)
    VALUES ($1::int, $2::timestamp, $3::text, $4::text, NOW(), NOW() + ($5::int * INTERVAL '1 minute'))
    ON CONFLICT (lock_key) 
    DO UPDATE SET 
        provider_id = EXCLUDED.provider_id,
        start_time = EXCLUDED.start_time,
        owner_token = EXCLUDED.owner_token,
        acquired_at = EXCLUDED.acquired_at,
        expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at
    WHERE booking_locks.expires_at <= NOW()
    RETURNING lock_id, lock_key, owner_token, acquired_at, expires_at, true as acquired, NULL::timestamptz as retry_after
)
SELECT * FROM upsert
UNION ALL
SELECT lock_id, lock_key, owner_token, acquired_at, expires_at, false as acquired, expires_at as retry_after
FROM booking_locks
WHERE lock_key = $3::text AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upsert)
LIMIT 1;

DELETE FROM booking_locks
WHERE lock_key = $1::text
  AND owner_token = $2::text
RETURNING lock_id, lock_key;

WITH upsert AS (
    INSERT INTO booking_locks (provider_id, start_time, lock_key, owner_token, acquired_at, expires_at)
    VALUES ($1::int, $2::timestamp, $3::text, $4::text, NOW(), NOW() + ($5::int * INTERVAL '1 minute'))
    ON CONFLICT (lock_key) 
    DO UPDATE SET 
        provider_id = EXCLUDED.provider_id,
        start_time = EXCLUDED.start_time,
        owner_token = EXCLUDED.owner_token,
        acquired_at = EXCLUDED.acquired_at,
        expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at
    WHERE booking_locks.expires_at <= NOW()
    RETURNING lock_id, lock_key, owner_token, acquired_at, expires_at, true as acquired, NULL::timestamptz as retry_after
)
SELECT * FROM upsert
UNION ALL
SELECT lock_id, lock_key, owner_token, acquired_at, expires_at, false as acquired, expires_at as retry_after
FROM booking_locks
WHERE lock_key = $3::text AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upsert)
LIMIT 1;

DELETE FROM booking_locks
WHERE lock_key = $1::text
  AND owner_token = $2::text
RETURNING lock_id, lock_key;
